title: Better Deco- The new Furniture Way
body: ![Banner](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/2fee7469cdce5ba90e17ca020262417aafe45d3d_0.webp) # 📖 About:  BetterDeco is a decorative mod designed to enrich the Minecraft experience without breaking its vanilla style. This project is based to fill the gap minecraft have: Decoration was for a long time a problem in minecraft and this mod want to expand it. Fully Vanilla-Friendly, this mod is perfect for both survival gameplay and creative map building. # **Features** It adds a wide variety of new features, including: - **Furniture** to decorate houses, taverns, modern builds, or rustic cabins. - **Vanilla**+ **Blocks**, creative and enhanced variants of classic blocks that stay true to the original look. - **Vertical slabs,Wall Lantern AND MORE**, offering brand-new building possibilities and architectural details.…and much more to give your creations extra depth and personality! - **CreativeTab Advanced Filter Sistem**: with the full help of BlackGear I added a wonderfull filter system to the creative tab.  - Adding over **100+ Furniture Pieces** for funny and usefull House,Home and more!! 📷 Pictures: ![Kitchen](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f15b5ab5fd25db41ad2ed57ea6ba822b4c725d2d_0.webp) ![Bedroom](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/320b4592d5b1c22bf145f003ae6b77b0f3675bf4_0.webp) ![Livingroom](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/367a1fd148a00e7c2f45c56f64326f1f7170d4a1_0.webp) Do You Need Support? Join the [Discord](https://discord.com/invite/335vcPRg) Server: For any help or news about development or projects status. Also for the issue report. Check My Other Projects here
